#AFlockOfSeagulls #IRan #sexeducation #netflix #AFlockOfSeagullsofficial #AFlockOfSeagullsAlbum #AFlockOfSeagullsofficialvideo #IRanofficialaudio #AFlockOfSeagullsSongs #AFlockOfSeagullsIRan #sexeducationNetflix 

---------
Lyrics
A cloud appears above your head
A beam of light comes shining down on you,
Shining down on you.
The cloud is moving nearer still.
Aurora borealis comes in view
Aurora comes in view.

And I ran, I ran so far away.
I just ran, I ran all night and day.
I couldn't get away.

Music video by A Flock Of Seagulls performing I Ran. (c) 1982 Zomba Productions Limited
